name: The Unified Kitty Coalition
description:
Bunny user, Sub POV.

Experience a very one-sided war initiated by large sexy feline women

i don’t usually make “low” quality bots public, but i liked this one enough to share it

art by Ghostoast

Why bunnies specifically? Because my current favorite persona is a bunny boy, and getting called a “hopper” or “cottontail” by the bot is funny to me
creator: Pilotus
